title: Founding Sales Development Representative (SDR)
description_text:
We are the top media company in sales behind the #1 sales podcast (3M+ downloads per year) and bestselling book, Cold Calling Sucks (And That's Why It Works).

And as our Founding Sales Development Representative, you'll be a critical member of the GTM team with our 2 founding AEs and CEO while getting your MBA in sales along the way.

This is a 0:1 role with huge upside reporting directly into the founder (me, Armand!).

If you're a student of the game of sales, hungry to build a career in it… keep reading.

Let's turn every single sales leader who listens to us into a customer.

You'll build our outbound engine and turn 30MPC's audience into pipeline:

 - Generate Pipeline From Day 1: You'll cold call, email, and social prospect into our built-in audience of sales leaders to book qualified meetings.

 - Live the Frameworks You're Selling: You'll master the 30MPC playbook (from cold calling to discovery to negotiation) so you can speak the exact language of the sales leaders you're prospecting.

 - Own Your Book: You'll manage your own pipeline of accounts, set your outreach strategy, and report on what's working.

 - Build This Function 0:1: You'll help us build the outbound playbook and prospecting process from scratch.

Why Join Us?

 - If you want responsibility and ownership on day 1... you'll be right at home joining our scrappy team of 10.

 - If you want the best sales training in the industry while you get paid to do it... you'll be coached by the same team behind the #1 sales podcast. This is your MBA in sales.

 - If you want to help build a new revenue line inside the #1 sales media company... you'll touch more parts of the business than you would in a traditional corporate SDR job.

Experience: Up for the job? We're looking for someone with 1 of 2 backgrounds:

 - New Grad Hungry to Break Into Sales: We'll teach you the

 - SDR With a Few Reps Under Your Belt: You've carried a quota and want to fast-track your craft (6 months sales experience).

Core Skills: You'll nail this job if you have the…

 - Sharpness To Learn: You're excited to geek out about the craft of sales and want to master cold calling, discovery, and negotiation, not just make a paycheck.

 - Top 1% Written and Verbal Communication Skills: You can get someone fired up about something without rambling their ears off.

 - Relentless Drive: You've got the resilience to handle rejection and keep dialing, day after day (and we'll be there in the trenches with you because this is an outbound team).

 - Desire to Build: You're comfortable in early-stage ambiguity where you'll help build the process, not just follow one.

Location & Compensation

 - Hybrid in New York (3 days in office)

 - Compensation Range: $70-90k OTE (commensurate with experience) — flag: adjust to your target; market data below.

Ready to punch your ticket to President's Club?

Grab your Hawaiian shirt and welcome aboard, folks.

title: Chief of Staff
description_text:
The Role
You'll work directly with the CEO and CFO as their force multiplier — turning executive priorities into organizational execution, keeping the company's most important initiatives moving, and making sure leadership time goes where it matters most. You'll sit at the center of strategy, operations, and finance, with visibility across everything the company does.

What You'll Do

 - Drive strategic initiatives end-to-end — take ambiguous, high-priority mandates from the CEO and CFO and deliver finished outcomes.

 - Run the executive operating rhythm — leadership meetings, planning cycles, OKRs/goals, and follow-through on decisions and action items.

 - Synthesize and brief — distill information from across the company into clear, decision-ready materials for the CEO and CFO.

 - Coordinate across functions — align engineering, product, GTM, and partnerships; identify and resolve cross-team dependencies before they become problems.

 - Support finance and corporate workstreams — partner with the CFO on board, investor, and partner materials: analysis, modeling, and narratives that hold up to institutional scrutiny.

 - Act as a trusted proxy — represent the CEO and CFO in meetings and workstreams, and handle confidential matters with discretion.


What We're Looking For

 - 4+ years in management consulting, investment banking, or an equivalent background (strategy, corporate development, or similar high-rigor roles) — this is a hard requirement.

 - MBA preferred but not required. Structured problem-solver, equally comfortable with financial models, operational processes, and difficult conversations.

 - Exceptional written and verbal communication; you make complex things simple.

 - High agency, low ego — you get things done without needing formal authority, and handle sensitive information with discretion.

 - Based in or willing to relocate to Singapore, with flexibility to travel between the three hubs.




WHAT WE OFFER

 - Purpose: The opportunity to contribute to making AI a public good

 - Growth: A self-directed environment where you can take initiative to shape your role and career

 - Compensation: Market-competitive compensation including, for most roles, exposure to pre-launch tokens

In addition, 0G Labs is committed to the health and well being of all of our team members. To that end, we provide reimbursements towards a holistic set of experiences and courses:

 - Core self: Transcendental Meditation

 - Mind: Landmark Education https://www.landmarkworldwide.com

 - Emotion: Art of Communication

 - Presence: Speech Coach

 - Body: Fitness, gym and exercise memberships/classes

title: Brand & Creative Designer (APAC Remote)
description_text:
We are looking for a visionary designer to elevate and evolve 0G's visual identity. In this role, you will act as the guardian of our brand, translating complex technology into stunning, accessible visuals. You will bridge the gap between product, community, and marketing, ensuring a cohesive narrative across every touchpoint—from high-fidelity UI dashboards to real-time Discord interactions.

Your Mandate:

 - Brand Stewardship: Develop and enforce a comprehensive brand guidelines system, ensuring alignment across all departments and external partners.

 - Asset Production: Produce high-impact marketing collateral (static, motion, and video) that resonates with our Web3-native audience.

 - Product Collaboration: Partner with engineering to design intuitive, visually compelling UI for decentralized applications and analytics dashboards.

 - Community Engagement: Design gamified experiences, competition assets, and interactive social media content that drives retention and hype within our ecosystem.

The Ideal Candidate:

 - Design Foundation: You possess strong graphic design fundamentals—mastery of typography, color theory, and layout—and are proficient in industry-standard tools (Figma, Adobe Photoshop, Illustrator, After Effects).

 - Fast-Paced & Adaptable: You thrive in high-velocity environments, expertly juggling multiple projects while maintaining quality and meeting deadlines. You synthesize feedback gracefully and iterate with precision.

 - Cross-Functional Translator: You're a natural collaborator who can distill diverse stakeholder requirements into cohesive, engaging designs that serve both product goals and community needs.

 - AI-First Workflow: You leverage AI tools (Midjourney, Runway, Firefly, or equivalent) to expedite ideation, create variations, and enhance video/texture production without sacrificing quality.

 - Video Production Expert: You are proficient in the entire video pipeline—from storyboarding and editing to motion graphics and sound design—capable of producing polished reels, tutorials, and event recaps.

 - [Bonus] Web3 Native: Deep familiarity with the decentralized ecosystem, NFTs, or blockchain culture is a strong plus.




WHAT WE OFFER

 - Purpose: The opportunity to contribute to making AI a public good

 - Growth: A self-directed environment where you can take initiative to shape your role and career

 - Compensation: Market-competitive compensation including, for most roles, exposure to pre-launch tokens

In addition, 0G Labs is committed to the health and well being of all of our team members. To that end, we provide reimbursements towards a holistic set of experiences and courses:

 - Core self: Transcendental Meditation

 - Mind: Landmark Education https://www.landmarkworldwide.com

 - Emotion: Art of Communication

 - Presence: Speech Coach

 - Body: Fitness, gym and exercise memberships/classes

title: Chief Technology Officer - AI Trainer - Freelance - 8-20 hrs/week - Remote
description_text:
Updated: 07 July 2026

Freelance | 8–20 hrs/week | Remote (EU/UK)

 

Are you an experienced technology leader ready to shape the evolution of artificial intelligence? Join 10x Team as a Freelance Chief Technology Officer (CTO) – AI Trainer and leverage your expertise to guide and enhance advanced AI models, all while enjoying the flexibility of remote, project-based work.

 

About Us
10x Team connects top independent professionals with cutting-edge AI labs to accelerate progress in artificial intelligence. We are seeking EU or UK-based CTOs and senior technology experts to train and refine AI systems on executive technology leadership, product strategy, technical architecture, and organizational best practices.

 

Key Responsibilities

 - Review and refine AI-generated content relating to executive technology management, technical strategy, and digital transformation

 - Evaluate the accuracy and practicality of AI suggestions on technology vision, team structure, and business alignment

 - Create real-world scenarios and case studies based on your CTO or senior tech leadership experience

 - Generate scenario variations that reflect best practices, forward-thinking tech strategies, and industry standards

 - Identify risks, gaps, or ambiguities in AI-generated content, providing actionable, structured feedback to boost accuracy

 - Guide AI systems to better understand and apply key CTO-level decision-making and technology leadership concepts

 

About You

 - Experienced CTO or senior technology leader with deep knowledge in tech strategy, digital transformation, and executive decision-making

 - Based in the EU or UK

 - Skilled in technical leadership, organizational design, product development, and innovation management

 - Analytical, detail-oriented, and able to provide clear, constructive feedback

 - Available for 8–20 hours per week and comfortable with asynchronous, remote collaboration

 

Why Join 10x Team?

 - Flexible, project-based freelance roles – 100% remote

 - Directly influence how AI learns and supports C-suite and technology decision-making

 - Access ongoing professional growth through our 10x Team AI Academy

 - Join a forward-thinking community of independent experts with clear briefings and streamlined onboarding

 

How To Apply
After applying, you’ll receive an email detailing the steps to:

 - Complete a short written assessment

 - Participate in an AI-powered interview

 

Important: Your application is only complete once you finish all steps via the email link.

 

Please note: these AI Lab missions are not traditional job openings with fixed start dates. Project demand is highly dynamic and matching depends on your expertise, availability, and current AI Lab needs. Some experts are matched within days, while others may wait longer for a suitable project.

 

Lead the shift toward AI-powered technology leadership—apply today!



#LI-TT1

-----------------------------------------

NOTE

At 10x, there are two types of opportunities:

 

1. Traditional freelance missions
These are regular project-based opportunities where the listed mission is the actual project you may work on.

 

2. AI Lab roles
For AI Lab roles, we scout, review, and approve profiles for access to future project opportunities.

The missions listed for AI Lab roles are not traditional job openings. AI Lab work is often highly confidential as this exposes information of what an AI Lab is working on, and project requests are unpredictable. When an AI Lab request comes in, we often need to respond within 24 hours with suitable talent.

Matching depends on the specific needs of each AI Lab project and your niche expertise. Once your profile is reviewed and approved, you may be matched to relevant AI Lab projects when suitable opportunities arise.

This can happen within hours, but it may also take months, depending on the researchers at the AI labs and their project needs.

title: Regional Director, Fairfield County
description_text:
About 3i Members 3i is a rapidly growing, invitation-only community of family offices and private investors sharing deals, insights, and networks. With a focus on alternative and off-market deal flow, shared benefits, and investor services, 3i serves as a kitchen table around which highly engaged high net worth individuals can discuss and debate compelling investment opportunities. Our network of 700+ investors has deployed nearly $1 billion through the community over the past few years since launching.

We're looking for a Regional Director based in Fairfield County, CT to serve our Connecticut and Westchester members.

Regional Director, Fairfield County (Remote)

The Regional Director at 3i is responsible for ensuring that members derive maximum value from the platform. This is a highly-autonomous remote role based in Fairfield County that includes both setting the strategy for how to engage and grow the 3i network in Connecticut and Westchester as well as executing that strategy to turn it into reality.

Responsibilities include:

 - Setting the regional strategy
   
   - Every region/city is unique. You'll get to know the members in your region and understand how the 3i network can best help them achieve their investment, personal, philanthropic, business and career goals
   
   - You'll be the voice of your members to drive 3i forward in your region
   
   - You'll set the strategy for member engagement and growth in your region, partnering with the 3i HQ team to ensure you're equipped to deliver the power of the organization locally

 - Member engagement
   
   - Manage the onboarding process for new members to ensure that they're thoughtfully integrated into the 3i community and can immediately leverage the power of the organization
   
   - Conduct quarterly check-ins with members to track their progress and ensure they are succeeding as members of 3i
   
   - Connect members with products that enable them to achieve their goals, such as investing groups, in-person and virtual events, masterminds, curated introductions, deal diligence calls, and more
   
   - Be the conduit between your members and the 3i investment team, to ensure your members are always aware of deals that match their investment interests
   
   - Ensure members have a positive experience such that they renew their memberships

 - Member growth
   
   - Drive the growth strategy for how you will invest in the growth of the 3i network within your region
   
   - We are a referral-only network so you'll need to be comfortable thoughtfully requesting, qualifying and engaging with referrals from your members
   
   - Run a sales process to close your prospects in a high-touch way

 - Local community-building
   
   - You'll build relationships with some of the most interesting and prominent people who live in your region
   
   - Set an event and engagement strategy for your region
   
   - Plan and execute events in your region that build community cohesion and engage members. You'll do this in partnership with our Events team, who handle the actual event logistics. You'll be responsible for identifying the event theme, curating the attendee list, and hosting the events
   
   - You should enjoy and be comfortable facilitating small curated meals with current and prospective members as well as hosting larger events

About you

 - Bachelor's degree or equivalent experience

 - Minimum of 5 years of experience in account management or sales, preferably in the financial or investment industry

 - Strong communication and interpersonal skills

 - High emotional intelligence

 - Ability to work independently and manage multiple tasks simultaneously

 - Willingness to travel as needed for in-person meetings and events

 - Passion for community, building relationships, and helping people succeed

What we offer

 - Competitive compensation

 - Paid time off – Unlimited vacation

 - Health Coverage — We cover up to $1,000 a month for healthcare premiums

 - 401K plan

title: Elektriker / Elektroniker Energie- und Gebäudetechnik (m/w/d) - Photovoltaik, Wärmepumpen & Energiesysteme - 1KOMMA5° Düsseldorf
description_text: 1KOMMA5° Bei 1KOMMA5° verfolgen wir eine Vision: Living on wind and sunlight forever for free . Dafür bauen wir mit Heartbeat AI das Energiesystem der Zukunft. Bist du dabei? Wir bringen regionales Handwerk und skalierbare Software zusammen: Solar, Speicher, Wärmepumpe und E-Mobilität denken wir nicht einzeln, sondern steuern sie als intelligentes, integriertes Gesamtsystem in unserem virtuellen Kraftwerk. Direkt verbunden mit dem Strommarkt – in Echtzeit, vollautomatisiert. So wird Energie dann genutzt, wenn sie erneuerbar verfügbar und besonders günstig ist. Bis 2030 wollen wir 1,5 Millionen Haushalte auf erneuerbare Energien umstellen. Über 3.000 Menschen arbeiten jeden Tag daran, an mehr als 80 Standorten weltweit, von Finnland bis Australien.  Du willst Verantwortung übernehmen und Lösungen bauen, die wirklich zählen? Bewirb dich jetzt und gestalte mit uns die Energiewelt von morgen.  Deine Position  Durchführung der AC-seitigen Installation von PV-Anlagen, Stromspeichern, Ladestationen sowie Wärmepumpen direkt beim Kunden vor Ort Sicherstellung der fachgerechten Inbetriebnahme der Anlagen und aller dazugehörigen Komponenten Verantwortung für das Ausfüllen und Einreichen relevanter Messprotokolle sowie Abnahmedokumente in Abstimmung mit dem Kunden Fehlerbehebung, Wartung und Instandsetzung bereits installierter Systeme, um einen reibungslosen Betrieb sicherzustellen  Dein Profil  Erfolgreich abgeschlossene Ausbildung im Elektrohandwerk, z. B. als Elektriker oder Elektroniker für Energie- und Gebäudetechnik (m/w/d) Eigenständige, qualitäts- und sicherheitsbewusste Arbeitsweise sowie ein hohes Verantwortungsbewusstsein Sicheres und freundliches Auftreten im Kundenkontakt, gepaart mit einer lösungsorientierten Denkweise Teamgeist und eine Hands-on-Mentalität, mit der du aktiv anpackst und Herausforderungen gemeinsam meisterst Führerschein der Klasse B, um flexibel zu den verschiedenen Einsatzorten zu gelangen  Benefits  Werde Teil eines wachsenden Start-ups und gestalte aktiv deine Zukunft sowie die des Unternehmens mit Nutze die Möglichkeit eines attraktiven Bike-Leasings über uns Freue dich auf regelmäßige Teamevents und gemeinsame Ausflüge Bei uns herrscht eine offene Duz-Kultur mit freundschaftlichem, aber respektvollem Miteinander – wir verstehen uns als ein großes Team Deine Arbeit trägt direkt zur Energiewende bei und macht einen echten Unterschied Gemeinsam setzen wir uns für eine nachhaltige Zukunft ein

title: Anlagenmechaniker SHK (m/w/d) Wärmepumpen & Heiztechnik - 1KOMMA5° Düsseldorf
description_text: 1KOMMA5° Bei 1KOMMA5° bauen wir Europas führende Energie-Software-Plattform “Heartbeat” und schaffen so ein virtuelles Kraftwerk , das Photovoltaik, Stromspeicher, Wärmepumpen und Ladesäulen der Kunden verknüpft und so die Rentabilität vernetzter Kundenanlagen deutlich erhöht. Wir bieten Kunden zudem einen " One-Stop-Shop" für den Kauf und die Installation individueller und intelligenter Energie-Systemlösungen, damit jeder Haushalt schnell und professionell klimaneutral wohnen, heizen und mobil sein kann. Gleichzeitig arbeiten wir in unserer Technologie-Sparte an der Weiterentwicklung und dem Ausbau der Heartbeat-Software, um Kunden weltweit mit dem Strommarkt zu vernetzen und so immer den günstigsten und saubersten Stromtarif anbieten zu können. Hast du Lust, die Energierevolution mit uns anzugehen? Dann bewirb dich jetzt und werde Teil unserer Mission!  Deine Position  Montage und Installation von Wärmepumpen sowie Wasserspeichern bei unseren Kund*innen vor Ort Du arbeitest im Team auf der Baustelle oder im Kundendienst und bist ein wichtiger Teil unseres Handwerkerteams Fachgerechte Installation von Heizkörpern, Dämmung von Warmwasserleitungen und Abdichtung von Wasserleitungen Qualitätssicherung durch sorgfältige Dokumentation der ausgeführten Arbeiten  Dein Profil  Abgeschlossene Ausbildung als Anlagenmechaniker SHK oder eine vergleichbare Qualifikation Erste Erfahrungen im Bereich Wärmepumpen von Vorteil, aber keine Voraussetzung Handwerkliches Geschick und körperliche Belastbarkeit für die Arbeit vor Ort Strukturierte, eigenständige und qualitätsbewusste Arbeitsweise Teamfähigkeit, hohe Motivation und Lust, die Energiewende aktiv mitzugestalten  Benefits  Werde Teil eines motivierenden, wachsenden Start-ups und gestalte aktiv deine Zukunft sowie die des Unternehmens mit Nutze die Möglichkeit eines attraktiven Bike-Leasings über uns Freue dich auf regelmäßige Teamevents und gemeinsame Ausflüge Bei uns herrscht eine offene Duz-Kultur mit freundschaftlichem, aber respektvollem Miteinander – wir verstehen uns als ein großes Team Deine Arbeit trägt direkt zur Energiewende bei und macht einen echten Unterschied Gemeinsam setzen wir uns für eine nachhaltige Zukunft ein

title: Initiativbewerbung Handwerk (m/w/d) – Anlagenmechaniker SHK / SHK‑Monteur / Elektroniker Energie- & Gebäudetechnik
description_text: 1KOMMA5° Bei 1KOMMA5° bauen wir Europas führende Energie-Software-Plattform “Heartbeat” und schaffen so ein virtuelles Kraftwerk , das Photovoltaik, Stromspeicher, Wärmepumpen und Ladesäulen der Kunden verknüpft und so die Rentabilität vernetzter Kundenanlagen deutlich erhöht. Wir bieten Kunden zudem einen " One-Stop-Shop" für den Kauf und die Installation individueller und intelligenter Energie-Systemlösungen, damit jeder Haushalt schnell und professionell klimaneutral wohnen, heizen und mobil sein kann. Gleichzeitig arbeiten wir in unserer Technologie-Sparte an der Weiterentwicklung und dem Ausbau der Heartbeat-Software, um Kunden weltweit mit dem Strommarkt zu vernetzen und so immer den günstigsten und saubersten Stromtarif anbieten zu können. Hast du Lust, die Energierevolution mit uns anzugehen? Dann bewirb dich jetzt und werde Teil unserer Mission!  Deine Position  Du unterstützt unsere Teams auf der Baustelle – je nach Qualifikation als Baustellenhelfer, Monteur, Geselle oder Meister im Bereich Sanitär, Heizung, Klima oder Elektrotechnik Du installierst und montierst moderne Heizungs‑, Sanitär‑ und Lüftungsanlagen bzw. Elektro‑ und Gebäudetechnik, von Neubauprojekten bis zur Modernisierung im Bestand Du baust Wärmepumpen, Heizungsanlagen und Trinkwasserinstallationen ein, nimmst sie in Betrieb und sorgst dafür, dass beim Kunden alles zuverlässig läuft Du führst Wartungs‑, Reparatur‑ und Instandsetzungsarbeiten durch und behebst Störungen, damit unsere Anlagen langfristig sicher und effizient arbeiten Je nach Erfahrungslevel übernimmst du mehr Verantwortung: von „einfach mit anpacken“ bis zur eigenständigen Baustellenorganisation oder Führung eines kleinen Teams  Dein Profil  Du bist Anlagenmechaniker (m/w/d) SHK, Heizungsbauer (m/w/d), Gas‑/Wasserinstallateur (m/w/d), Lüftungsbauer (m/w/d), Elektroniker für Energie‑ und Gebäudetechnik (m/w/d) – oder hast eine vergleichbare handwerkliche Ausbildung im SHK‑ oder Elektrobereich abgeschlossen Alternativ hast du mehrere Jahre praktische Erfahrung als Monteur (m/w/d) oder Baustellenhelfer (m/w/d) im Bereich Sanitär/Heizung/Klima oder Elektro und willst den nächsten Schritt machen Du arbeitest zuverlässig, gern im Team und kannst dich auf wechselnde Baustellen und Situationen einstellen; selbstständiges Arbeiten und Verantwortung für „deine“ Baustelle sind für dich selbstverständlich Ein Führerschein der Klasse B liegt dir vor, damit du unsere Servicefahrzeuge nutzen und direkt von zu Hause zu den Kundeneinsätzen starten kannst Egal ob Berufseinsteiger, erfahrener Monteur oder Meister: Wichtig ist uns, dass du Lust auf moderne Technik, Energiewende und hochwertige Arbeit beim Kunden hast  Benefits  Unbefristeter Arbeitsvertrag in einer zukunftsrelevanten Branche und faire, oft übertarifliche Bezahlung mit attraktiven Zusatzleistungen Mindestens 27 Tage Urlaub für echte Erholung, teils zusätzliche freie Tage (z. B. an Heiligabend und Silvester) und Freizeitausgleich für Zeitguthaben Eigenes Servicefahrzeug bzw. modernes Firmenfahrzeug und top ausgestatteter Werkzeugkoffer, hochwertige Arbeitskleidung (z. B. Engelbert Strauss) sowie Smartphone/Tablet für die digitale Auftragsabwicklung Digitale Zeiterfassung und Projektverwaltung, strukturierte Einarbeitung mit Mentor, regelmäßige Schulungen und individuelle Weiterbildungen – bis hin zu echten Karriere‑ und Aufstiegsmöglichkeiten (z. B. zum Vorarbeiter oder Meister) Finanzielle Extras wie betriebliche Altersvorsorge, vermögenswirksame Leistungen, Erfolgsbeteiligung/Bonusmodelle/Montageprämien, JobRad/E‑Bike‑Leasing, Tank‑ oder Fahrtkostenzuschuss sowie Gesundheits‑ und Fitnessangebote (z. B. Urban Sports/EGYM Wellpass, Krankenzusatzversicherung) Ein kollegiales, familiäres Team mit flachen Hierarchien, kurzen Entscheidungswegen, regelmäßigen Team‑Events und moderner „New‑Work“‑Kultur – damit Arbeit, Privatleben und Familie gut zusammenpassen

title: (Senior) Marketing & Event Manager*in 1KOMMA5° Ost – Berlin
description_text: 1KOMMA5°  Bei 1KOMMA5° verfolgen wir eine Vision: Living on wind and sunlight forever for free . Dafür bauen wir mit Heartbeat AI das Energiesystem der Zukunft. Bist du dabei? Wir bringen regionales Handwerk und skalierbare Software zusammen: Solar, Speicher, Wärmepumpe und E-Mobilität denken wir nicht einzeln, sondern steuern sie als intelligentes, integriertes Gesamtsystem in unserem virtuellen Kraftwerk. Direkt verbunden mit dem Strommarkt – in Echtzeit, vollautomatisiert. So wird Energie dann genutzt, wenn sie erneuerbar verfügbar und besonders günstig ist. Bis 2030 wollen wir 1,5 Millionen Haushalte auf erneuerbare Energien umstellen. Über 3.000 Menschen arbeiten jeden Tag daran, an mehr als 80 Standorten weltweit, von Finnland bis Australien. Du willst Verantwortung übernehmen und Lösungen bauen, die wirklich zählen? Bewirb dich jetzt und gestalte mit uns die Energiewelt von morgen.  Deine Position  Als (Senior) Marketing & Event Manager*in  für den Bereich 1KOMMA5° Ost übernimmst du die strategische und operative Verantwortung für Marketinginitiativen in deiner Region. Du entwickelst für deine verschiedenen 1KOMMA5° Standorte zielgerichtete Marketing- und Eventstrategien, planst und setzt regionale Veranstaltungen erfolgreich um und sorgst so für eine starke Vertriebsunterstützung. Dabei berichtest du direkt an den HUB-Lead Sales & Marketing Ost und arbeitest eng mit internen und externen Stakeholdern zusammen. Deine Aufgaben Strategische Planung: Du entwickelst gemeinsam mit dem Marketing Team der Holding und deinem Sales Lead eine nachhaltige Event- und Marketingstrategie für deinen geografischen Bereich, die unsere Unternehmensziele unterstützt. Eigeninitiative & Koordination: Du stellst sicher, dass Event- und Marketinginitiativen in deiner Region an den verschiedenen 1KOMMA5° Standorten effizient und professionell umgesetzt werden. Erfolgsmessung & Optimierung: Du orientierst dich dabei an klaren KPIs, erstellst entsprechende Reportings und leitest konkrete Verbesserungsmaßnahmen ab. Sales-Fokus: Du arbeitest eng mit dem regionalen Sales Team zusammen, gehst auf aktuelle Bedürfnisse ein und verstehst es, Verkaufschancen zu kreieren und mithilfe passender Marketing-Maßnahmen zu konvertieren. Marktanalyse & Chancen: Du identifizierst relevante Messen, Events, Sponsoring- und Werbemöglichkeiten sowie Content-Ideen zur Steigerung unserer Markenbekanntheit. Event-Management: Du planst, begleitest und hostest regionale Veranstaltungen und sorgst für deren reibungslose Umsetzung in unseren Showrooms und an weiteren Locations. Du führst einen übersichtlichen Event-Kalender und koordinierst alle geplanten Aktivitäten in Absprache mit dem Event Team der Holding. Kunden Incentivierung: Du vernetzt dich eng mit 1KOMMA5° Kunden in deiner Region und bringst ihnen unser Weiterempfehlungsprogramm näher. Gemeinsam überzeugt ihr potenzielle Interessenten auf Informationsevents von 1KOMMA5°. Zudem organisierst du Bestandskundenevents, um die Kundenzufriedenheit zu fördern, Schwachstellen zu analysieren oder Neuheiten zu teilen. Schnittstellenmanagement: Du agierst als zentrale Ansprechperson zwischen deinen lokalen Teams und der zentralen Marketing-Abteilung und sorgst für einen regelmäßigen Austausch.  Dein Profil  Du bringst erste Führungserfahrung mit und weißt, wie du Menschen motivierst und in ihrer Entwicklung förderst. Du besitzt mehrjährige Praxiserfahrung im Event- und Marketingmanagement, idealerweise in einem B2C-Umfeld Du besitzt ein ausgeprägtes Organisationstalent, eine starke Eigeninitiative, denkst strategisch und behältst auch unter Zeitdruck den Überblick über deine Prios. Hands-on-Mentalität trifft analytischen Scharfsinn: Du probierst gerne neue Ansätze aus, kannst auf veränderte Umstände oder Bedürfnisse schnell reagieren und triffst deine Entscheidungen dabei stets datenbasiert und analytisch fundiert. Du hast idealerweise ein Netzwerk im Event- und Messebereich und kennst die regionale Eventlandschaft. Du bist reisebereit (vorwiegend in Ostdeutschland) und arbeitest flexibel – sowohl im Büro als auch remote. Du kommunizierst absolut sicher und professionell auf Deutsch und Englisch in Wort und Schrift. Dir fällt es leicht, Menschen von einer Marke und Produkten zu überzeugen und du scheust dich nicht vor Präsentationen oder persönlicher Kommunikation im Kundenkontakt.  Benefits  Flexibilität & Selbstbestimmung: Du gestaltest deine Arbeitszeit eigenverantwortlich – für echten Erfolg im Einklang mit deinem Leben. Moderne Ausstattung & Mobilität: Du erhältst alles, was du brauchst – Laptop, Diensthandy und weitere hilfreiche Extras, die Deinen Arbeitsalltag erleichtern. Zusammenarbeit auf Augenhöhe: Transparenz, direkte Kommunikation und kurze Entscheidungswege prägen unsere Kultur. Sinn & Gestaltungsspielraum: Du leistest einen greifbaren Beitrag zur Energiewende und gestaltest unseren Vertrieb aktiv mit. EGYM Wellpass: Mit Zugang zu tausenden Sport- und Wellnesseinrichtungen bleibst du flexibel, fit und ausgeglichen.

title: Teamleiter / SHK-Meister Wärmepumpeninstallation (m/w/d)
description_text: Deine Aufgaben  Führung und Organisation Führung und Koordination von Montageteams Anleitung und Weiterentwicklung von Monteuren Einsatzplanung und Baustellenorganisation Installation & Technik Installation und Inbetriebnahme von Wärmepumpensystemen Umsetzung moderner Heiztechnik im Neubau und Bestand Sicherstellung der technischen Qualität auf der Baustelle Projekt- und Baustellensteuerung Planung und Koordination von Installationsabläufen Überwachung von Terminen, Qualität und Fortschritt Schnittstelle zwischen Projektleitung, Kunden und Team Qualität & Verantwortung Sicherstellung sauberer und fachgerechter Installationen Kontrolle von Arbeitsergebnissen und Einhaltung von Standards  Dein Profil  Meister im Bereich Sanitär, Heizung, Klima (SHK) oder vergleichbare Qualifikation Mehrjährige Erfahrung in der Heizungsinstallation und fundierte Erfahrung mit Wärmepumpen Erste Erfahrung in der Führung von Teams oder Baustellen Selbstständige, strukturierte und lösungsorientierte Arbeitsweise Hohes Qualitätsbewusstsein und Verantwortungsgefühl Führerschein Klasse B  Warum wir?  Bei 360Volt treiben wir die Energiewende aktiv voran und setzen neue Standards im modernen Handwerk. Unser Fokus liegt auf Wärmepumpen, Photovoltaik und smarten Gebäudetechnologien – zentrale Bausteine für eine nachhaltige Energieversorgung. Unser Ziel ist klar: Deutschlands führenden Handwerksbetrieb für erneuerbare Energien aufzubauen. Dafür suchen wir erfahrene Fachkräfte, die Verantwortung übernehmen, Teams führen und gemeinsam mit uns die Zukunft des Handwerks gestalten wollen. Attraktive und leistungsgerechte Vergütung, Bonusmodelle und Beteiligungspakete Firmenfahrzeug (auch zur privaten Nutzung möglich) Moderne Arbeitsausstattung und hochwertige Arbeitskleidung Arbeiten in einer Zukunftsbranche (Energiewende) Klare Strukturen und gleichzeitig viel Gestaltungsspielraum  Kontakt dein Recruiting-Team der 306Volt bewerbung@360volt.de

title: Marketing Manager
description_text:
About 3i

3i is a rapidly growing, invitation-only community of private investors sharing deals, insights, and contacts. With a focus on alternative and off-market deal flow, shared benefits, and investor services, 3i serves as a kitchen table around which highly engaged family offices and private allocators can discuss and debate compelling, unexpected opportunities in emerging sectors.



Marketing Manager – New York

3i is hiring a Marketing Manager to join a small, high-output team building the brand infrastructure for one of the fastest-growing private investor networks in the country.



This role owns the day-to-day execution of 3i's marketing communications — from our weekly member newsletter to event promotion, onboarding sequences, and Summit programming. You'll work closely with the Head of Brand and Marketing to shape how we tell our story, who hears it, and how we grow our community while preserving the intimacy and exclusivity that make 3i special. It's a chance to do meaningful marketing work in a space that rarely gets it right.



This role is based full-time in our New York City office near Madison Square Park and reports to the Head of Brand and Marketing.



Responsibilities:

 - Own and execute the weekly member newsletter end to end — writing, editing, coordinating inputs, and ensuring consistent voice and quality every week.

 - Write and manage all member-facing communications including event invitations, onboarding emails, announcements, and ongoing member engagement campaigns.

 - Maintain and evolve 3i's brand voice across all written touchpoints, ensuring consistency across channels and audiences.

 - Manage and grow 3i's presence on LinkedIn and other relevant brand channels — developing content, writing posts, and ensuring the channel reflects the voice and standards of the brand.

 - Support the development and execution of marketing strategy for events, the annual Summit, and programming initiatives.

 - Collaborate with leadership to develop messaging for new products, member initiatives, and community programming.

 - Manage relationships with freelance writers, designers, and other creative vendors — briefing, reviewing, and ensuring output meets brand standards.

 - Track performance of email communications and brand channels to surface insights and inform future content and strategy.

 - Support internal communications as needed, including team updates and member-facing announcements.
   
   

About You

 - 4 to 7 years of experience in marketing, brand, or communications — ideally at a financial services firm, a media company, or premium consumer brand.

 - Exceptional writer. This is non-negotiable. You write with clarity, economy, and a strong editorial instinct. You can adapt your voice to match a brand and a person.

 - Proven track record owning a newsletter or regular content publication, with a demonstrated history of consistency and quality.

 - Experience managing a brand's social presence, particularly LinkedIn, with an understanding of what drives engagement among a professional and high-net-worth audience.

 - Comfortable operating in a fast-moving, lean environment where you are expected to execute at a high level with limited oversight.

 - Strong organizational skills and the ability to manage multiple deadlines and stakeholders simultaneously.

 - Familiarity with HubSpot and similar email marketing platforms.

 - Genuine interest in investing, private markets, or finance is a plus — intellectual curiosity about the subject matter matters here.

 - Based in or willing to relocate to New York City. This is a full-time, in-office role.
   
   

What We Offer

 - Competitive Compensation

 - Comprehensive health, dental, vision, and 401(k)

 - Collaborative office environment at 41 Madison-a hub for leading founders and investors

 - Paid time off - Unlimited vacation

title: Institutional Sales Lead
location_raw: Remote — North America (Aligned with U.S. Time Zones)
description_text:
COMPANY

At 0x https://0x.org/, our mission is to "Create a Tokenized World Where All Forms of Value Can Flow Freely". We deliver this to web3 builders with a delightfully simple suite of developer APIs that provide faster trading, better prices, and superior user experience.

Founded in 2017, we’ve processed over 211M+ transactions and $180B+ in trading volume from users trading on Matcha, Coinbase Wallet, Robinhood Wallet, Phantom, Rainbow, DefiLlama, MetaMask, Zerion, Zapper, and many more. Our investors include Greylock Partners, Pantera Capital, and Jump Crypto.

When you join 0x, you’ll become part of a veteran team of crypto builders who know the importance of code quality, team cohesion, and a culture of learning.



ABOUT THE ROLE


We are seeking a senior sales executive to own and scale relationships across the fintech, payments, and digital asset ecosystem, driving adoption of the protocol layer quietly powering the next generation of financial infrastructure.

This is a rare opportunity to operate at the intersection of traditional finance and onchain markets, building the revenue engine for one of crypto's most critical pieces of infrastructure. We are looking for someone that will:


 - Own and scale the institutional pipeline through field sales and outbound execution Drive a consistent flow of high-quality institutional opportunities through a combination of outbound prospecting, ecosystem relationship development, and field sales effort
   

 - Build and maintain senior-level relationships across the ecosystem
   Develop and manage executive relationships across fintechs, payment platforms, wallets, tokenization platforms, and crypto infrastructure providers. Represent 0x at conferences and industry events to strengthen market presence and brand credibility.
   

 - Lead full-cycle, consultative sales for complex deals
   Own the end-to-end sales process from sourcing to close, including discovery, qualification, technical scoping (in partnership with engineering), and negotiation. Navigate multi-stakeholder sales cycles and clearly position 0x’s infrastructure and API products to both technical and business audiences.
   

 - Leverage market expertise to shape deal strategy
   Apply a strong understanding of market structure, ecosystem participants, and product positioning to inform deal strategy, accelerate decision-making, and drive successful outcomes.
   

 - Own and grow a strategic portfolio of institutional accounts
   Manage and expand relationships with accounts you originate, acting as a trusted advisor post-sale. Drive adoption, expansion, and long-term value creation while collaborating cross-functionally to ensure strong customer outcomes. Provide coverage across key accounts as needed.
   

 - Build and refine outbound motion and pipeline discipline
   Develop targeted outbound strategies across priority institutional segments. Continuously experiment with messaging, refine ICP definition, and establish scalable, repeatable prospecting approaches that complement field-driven pipeline generation.
   

 - Partner cross-functionally to build the GTM engine
   Work closely with Product, Engineering, Marketing, and Leadership to improve segmentation, pipeline visibility, and sales processes. Help define and operationalize the early sales playbook, including qualification frameworks, deal strategy, and account ownership models.
   

 - Contribute to commercial strategy and GTM design
   Collaborate with leadership on quota design, compensation structure, territory planning, and broader GTM strategy. Act as a key contributor in building a durable, institutional-grade revenue engine.
   

 - Act as a senior external representative of 0x
   Develop deep expertise in 0x’s infrastructure, APIs, and the broader crypto ecosystem. Serve as a credible, executive-level counterpart to institutional partners evaluating 0x.
   


REQUIREMENTS


 - 8–15+ years of full-cycle B2B sales or strategic partnerships experience, with clear ownership of pipeline, quota, and revenue outcomes.

 - Familiarity with the institutional space, including tokenization platforms, payment platforms, and neobanks

 - Experience working with or selling into payments, stablecoins, or digital asset infrastructure use cases

 - Experience selling into institutional clients, such as neobanks, payment platforms, banks, asset managers, or crypto-native companies

 - Ability to engage with C-level stakeholders and external partners, acting as both a commercial lead and strategic advisor

 - Strong ability to sell technical products (e.g., APIs, infrastructure, developer tooling) and engage effectively with both technical and business stakeholders

 - Highly autonomous and adaptable; thrives in early-stage or evolving GTM environments with limited structure

 - Strong cross-functional collaborator, with experience working closely with Product, Engineering, and Leadership

 - Demonstrated ability to operate with high autonomy in an early-stage GTM environment with evolving processes and limited structure.

 - Collaborative mindset with the ability to partner closely across Product, BD, Leadership, and Operations.

 - High integrity, low ego, and strong alignment with building long-term value over short-term wins

 - Willingness to travel globally for customer meetings, conferences, and twice-annual team offsites.

 - Knowledge and passion for decentralized finance and the 0x mission https://0x.org/post/the-0x-mission-and-values#:~:text=greater%20financial%20sovereignty.-,Our%20mission,the%20same%20way%20that%20the%20internet%20has%20democratized%20access%20to%20information.,-Workshop%20Cafe%20in

 - Exhibit our core values https://0x.org/post/the-0x-mission-and-values#:~:text=Our%20core%20values,through%20these%20battles.: do the right thing, consistently ship, and focus on long-term impact
   


PREFERRED


 - Experience in crypto infrastructure, DeFi, or blockchain ecosystems

 - A hybrid background in Web2 SaaS/B2B sales, bringing structured sales fundamentals while remaining adaptable to crypto’s pace.

 - Exposure to payments, stablecoins, or embedded finance

 - Familiarity with selling technical infrastructure or API-driven products.

 - Exposure to early GTM building, such as outbound program creation, segmentation, or sales playbook development.

 - Strong interest in or existing knowledge of DeFi, blockchain ecosystems, and the broader crypto landscape.
   


BENEFITS


 - The base salary range for this position is USD $150,000 - $250,000 + commission + equity + ZRX tokens + benefits. Within the range, individual pay is determined by job-related skills, experience, location, business needs, and candidate preferences between the different compensation elements.

 - Comprehensive insurance (medical/dental/vision/life/disability) for U.S.-based employees — 100% of base plan covered for you and dependents

 - 401k and FSA for U.S.-based employees

 - Monthly mobile phone bill, wellness, and pre-tax transportation expense

 - Covered mental health benefits (included professional therapy sessions)

 - A supportive remote environment

 - Lunch reimbursement for all employees across the globe!

 - Stipend for your ideal remote / WFH set-up: headphones, and any other work gear you may need

 - 12-week paid parental leave

 - Great office conveniently located in the SF Financial District for those in the region!

 - Flexible vacation: Take time when you need it (and we really mean it!)

0x and its associated entities are dedicated to fostering diversity, inclusion, and belonging in its teams and workforce, and are proud to be equal opportunity employers. 0x does not make employment or hiring decisions on the basis of race, color, creed, religion, sex (including those who are pregnant or have given birth), sexual orientation, gender, gender expression or identity, age, disability, medical condition, genetic information, military or veteran status, marital status, pregnancy, citizenship, national origin, immigration or citizenship status, political affiliation, or any other basis that is protected by applicable local, state, or federal laws. This includes not making such decisions based on the status itself, as well as any associations, perceptions, and assumptions made regarding these statuses. 0x will also consider qualified applicants with arrest and conviction records in a way that is consistent with San Francisco’s Fair Chance Ordinance and similar local laws. Our commitment to equal employment opportunity extends to ensuring that all applicants and employees can perform to their fullest potential, including through obtaining reasonable accommodations when necessary.

title: Senior .Net/C# Developer, SaaS Manager
description_text:
1Password is growing. We’ve surpassed $400M in ARR and we’re continuing to accelerate, earning a spot on the Forbes Cloud 100 for four years in a row and teaming up with iconic partners like Oracle Red Bull Racing.



About 1Password

At 1Password, we’re building the foundation for a safe, productive digital future. Our mission is to unleash employee productivity without compromising security by ensuring every identity is authentic, every application sign-in is secure, and every device is trusted. We innovated the market-leading enterprise password manager and pioneered Unified Access Management, a new cybersecurity category built for the way people and AI agents work today. As one of the most loved brands in cybersecurity, we take a human-centric approach in everything from product strategy to user experience. Over 180,000 businesses, from Fortune 100 leaders to the world’s most innovative AI companies, trust 1Password to help their teams securely adopt the SaaS and AI tools they need to do their best work.



If you're excited about the opportunity to contribute to the digital safety of millions, to work alongside a team of curious, driven individuals, and to solve hard problems in a fast-paced, dynamic environment, then we want to hear from you. Come join us and help shape a safer, simpler digital future.



How we’re using AI today

Our Engineering, Product, and Design teams are thoughtfully integrating AI across the full software and product development lifecycle to move faster without sacrificing quality or security. In practice, that looks like engineers using AI-assisted coding tools to accelerate reviews and catch bugs earlier, product managers synthesizing user research at scale, and designers rapidly prototyping and iterating with AI-generated mockups. We approach AI the same way we approach security: with clear principles, human accountability at every consequential decision point, and rigorous evaluation before anything ships to customers.



As part of the SaaS Manager https://1password.com/product/saas-manager team, you'll be building the platform that IT and Security teams rely on to discover, govern, and optimize their AI and SaaS ecosystems (work that just earned 1Password recognition as a Leader in the 2026 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for SaaS Management Platforms). You'll work on real problems: uncontrolled AI spend, shadow IT, SaaS sprawl, and the complex access lifecycles that come with it. Following 1Password's acquisition of Trelica in early 2025 https://blog.1password.com/1password-acquires-trelica/, you'll join a collaborative team with a startup mindset backed by the resources and mission of one of the most trusted names in security. As we scale the platform to meet our enterprise-scale ambitions, you'll help shape not just what we build, but how we build it.

We are hiring a Senior Developer who can go deep on complex problems and come up for air to bring their team with them; someone who ships high-quality work with a high degree of independence, champions technical excellence within their team, and makes the engineers around them better in the process.

This is a remote opportunity within Canada and the US, ideally with the ability to work within Eastern Time hours.




WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR:

 - You have 5+ years of experience in software development, with strong working knowledge of .NET/C#/MongoDB or similar.

 - You can tackle large, complex engineering problems with a high degree of independence.

 - You're a subject matter expert in the features and systems your team owns; you identify gaps, propose improvements, and leave code meaningfully better than you found it.

 - You champion technical innovation within your team: you evaluate new tools and approaches critically, advocate for the ones worth adopting, and help your teammates understand why.

 - You set a high bar for code quality through thorough code reviews, strong test coverage, and clear documentation. You share your reasoning in a way that helps others grow.

 - You communicate well across technical and non-technical contexts: you can write a clear design doc, facilitate a productive engineering discussion, and explain a hard problem to a partner without losing the plot.

 - You have a practical, curious approach to agentic AI in the software development lifecycle: you use it where it creates real leverage in your own work, form opinions about what's actually useful, and share what you learn with your team without needing to be prompted

 - You're a strong mentor: you guide less experienced developers through pair programming, code review feedback, and technical conversations, and you do it in a way that builds their confidence and independence over time


WHAT YOU CAN EXPECT:

 - Own the design and delivery of complex features end-to-end, from initial scoping through production, with minimal guidance and a high standard for what "done" means

 - Contribute to and lead technical design discussions within your team: write clear design documents, surface risks early, propose solutions, and build consensus around the right approach

 - Set and uphold best practices within the team (e.g. testing strategies, code quality norms, observability standards, etc.) and make sure they stick through code reviews and hands-on involvement.

 - Partner closely with product managers and designers to understand the customer problems behind the work, advocate for sound engineering, and help the team make good tradeoffs

 - Bring a practical, hands-on perspective on where agentic AI tools create genuine leverage in your own workflow and share what works with your teammates


BONUS POINTS FOR:

 - Experience evolving a legacy or growth-stage application into an enterprise-scale platform

 - Comfort across a wide range of technical stacks (.NET/C#, MongoDB, Go, Rust, TypeScript, React, and others); you evaluate technology on its merits for the problem at hand, not personal preference, and you pick up new languages quickly



USA-based roles only: The annual base salary for this role is between $153,000 USD and $214,000 USD, plus immediate participation in 1Password's benefits program (health, dental, 401k and many others), utilization of our generous paid time off, an equity grant and, where applicable, participation in our incentive programs.

Canada-based roles only: The annual base salary for this role is between $144,000 CAD and $202,000 CAD, plus immediate participation in 1Password’s generous benefits program (health, dental, RRSP and many others), utilization of our generous paid time off, an equity grant and, where applicable, participation in our incentive programs.

At 1Password, we approach each individual's compensation with a promise of fair market value and internal equity commensurate with experience and specific skill set.

This posting is for an existing vacancy.


Our culture
At 1Password, we prioritize collaboration, clear and transparent communication, receptiveness to feedback, and alignment with our core values: keep it simple, lead with honesty, and put people first.

You’ll be part of a team that challenges the status quo, and is excited to experiment and iterate in search of the best solution. That said, 1Password is not for everyone https://blog.1password.com/inside-the-culture-powering-1passwords-next-chapter/. Our work is demanding, we strive for excellence, and the pace is fast. We need people who are keen to take on challenging problems, who seek feedback to grow, and who are driven to make an impact. If you're looking for a place where you can settle into a comfortable routine, this might not be the right fit for you. We’re looking for individuals who are proven experts in their fields, as well as those who are highly adaptable, can thrive in ambiguity and through change, are curious, and above all deliver results.

We are committed to leveraging cutting-edge technology—including AI—to achieve our mission. We also understand that thinking critically about AI in its current forms will help us create better solutions for our customers and ourselves with its future forms, which will help us continue to close the gap between security and privacy and achieve our mission. We want team members at all levels to take the approach of actively learning AI best practices, identifying opportunities to apply AI in meaningful ways, and driving innovative solutions in their daily work. Embracing the future of AI isn't just encouraged at 1Password—it's an essential part of how we will be successful at 1Password.

Our approach to remote work
We believe in the power of remote work, but recognize that in-person connection is important to help us achieve our mission. While we are a remote-first company, travel for in-person engagement is a part of almost all roles, and we require our employees to be ready and willing to take part. Frequency will depend on role and responsibilities, and may include, but is not limited to: annual department-wide offsites, team meetings, and customer/industry events.

What we offer
We believe in working hard, and rewarding that hard work through our benefits. While not an exhaustive list, here is a glance at what we currently offer:

Health and wellbeing
👶 Maternity and parental leave top-up programs
🩺 Competitive health benefits
🏝 Generous PTO policy

Growth and future
📈 RSU program for most employees
💸 Retirement matching program
🔑 Free 1Password account

Community
🤝 Paid volunteer days
🏆 Peer-to-peer recognition through Bonusly
🌎 Remote-first work environment
*Some roles in our GTM team are currently being hired for in-person hybrid work in Toronto and Austin. These roles will specify on the posting.



You belong here.



1Password is proud to be an equal opportunity employer. We are committed to fostering an inclusive, diverse and equitable workplace that is built on trust, support and respect. We welcome all individuals and do not discriminate on the basis of gender identity and expression, race, ethnicity, disability, sexual orientation, colour, religion, creed, gender, national origin, age, marital status, pregnancy, sex, citizenship, education, languages spoken or veteran status. Be yourself, find your people and share the things you love.



Accommodation is available upon request at any point during our recruitment process. If you require an accommodation, please speak to your talent acquisition partner or email us at nextbit@agilebits.com and we’ll work to meet your needs.



Remote work is a part of our DNA. Given that our company was founded remotely in 2005, we can safely say we're experts at building remote culture. That said, remote work at 1Password does mean working from your home country. If you've got questions or concerns about this, your talent partner would be happy to address them with you.



Successful applicants will be required to complete a background check that may consist of prior employment verification, reference checks, education confirmation, criminal background, publicly available social media, credit history, or other information, as permitted by local law.



1Password uses artificial intelligence (AI) and machine learning (ML) technologies, including natural language processing and predictive analytics, to assist in the initial screening of employment applications and improve our recruitment process. See here https://www.ashbyhq.com/downloadables/ashby-bias-audit-08-2024.pdf for the latest third party bias audit information. If you prefer not to have your application assessed using AI/ML features, you may opt out by completing this form https://jobs.ashbyhq.com/1password/automation-notice. For additional information see our Candidate Privacy Notice https://1password.com/files/candidate-privacy-notice.pdf.

title: Certified Medical Assistant
description_text:
Job Type: Full-time, Contract (1099)

Pay: From $20.00 per hour



Work Location: Remote (Must reside in the United States)

We are seeking qualified Certified Medical Assistants (or LPNs/LVNs) to join our growing virtual care team at 1bios as Care Professionals. In this fully remote role, you will work directly with patients to help manage chronic conditions and improve health outcomes—all from home, with a consistent schedule and no in-person clinical responsibilities.



Multilingual Opportunities: We are actively hiring Care Professionals who are bilingual and speak several different languages—including Spanish, Korean, Filipino, and Russian, among others. Please highlight any secondary language fluencies on your application.



About the Role

1bios is a leading provider of Remote Patient Monitoring (RPM), Chronic Care Management (CCM), and other virtual care management technologies and solutions. Our Care Pros work under 1bios client physician and/or nurse general supervision and utilize the 1bios platform to deliver virtual care.

In this position, you will act as a virtual care coach helping people with chronic conditions. Care Coaches help onboard patients, deliver RPM and/or CCM programs, review and triage remote monitoring alerts, collaborate with an extended care team, coordinate care, follow and update patient care plans, and support patients in achieving their health goals.



Important Note on Daily Volume: You should expect to spend most of your day on the phone and computer, including making approximately 30–70 outbound calls per day. This role is best suited for candidates who are highly comfortable in a fast-paced, high-volume, phone-based outreach environment.

We are looking for candidates who are available to begin within approximately 2 weeks of accepting an offer. This role is structured as a 1099 independent contractor position.



Primary Duties and Responsibilities:

 - Manage a panel of patients (up to 225), providing monthly care and support via phone and electronic communication under physician supervision.

 - Perform structured health assessments and follow patient care plans to support patient care, while recording all interactions electronically (entering notes, setting reminder follow-ups).

 - Create electronic alert escalations and notify physicians or nurses based on pre-established clinical rules regarding changes in patient status.
   
   

Qualifications & Requirements:

 - Must legally reside and work within the United States.

 - Certified Medical Assistant / LPN / LVN credentials required.

 - Highly skilled in using computers, software, and remote technology.

 - Strong verbal, phone, written, and electronic communication skills.

 - Ability to work remotely and independently outside of a traditional office environment.

 - Must have a dedicated workspace free of outside noise with strict privacy to protect patient confidentiality.

 - Enthusiastic, eager to learn, and driven by a desire to help others.

 - Experience with Remote Patient Monitoring (RPM) or Chronic Care Management (CCM) is preferred but not required.



Benefits:

 - Fully remote work-from-home flexibility

 - Opportunities for professional advancement

 - Paid training

As a Senior Channel Account Manager, you will be responsible for driving revenue growth through strategic National and Regional Partners by developing joint business plans, setting sales targets, and executing go-to-market strategies.



You are experienced in developing and executing channel strategies that successfully drive growth and revenue in cybersecurity and SaaS. You’ll elevate 1Password’s presence within the partner ecosystem by building strong, trusted relationships and leading joint selling efforts.



Your ability to influence partner strategy and execution will directly impact 1Password’s success in expanding its channel reach.



This is a remote opportunity within the US, with 40-50% travel expected.

Must be located in the Greater Chicago, Boston or New York area.



How we’re using AI today
Across GTM, we’re transforming the way we work with AI. We expect every seller, CSM, and team member to become a power user, using it daily to work smarter and move faster. AI is already embedded in how we operate – from real-time coaching that sharpens how we sell and interact with customers, to surfacing insights that help us anticipate needs – creating more time for meaningful customer engagement. If you’re excited to reshape how you think, make decisions, and drive growth with AI, you’ll feel right at home here.



What we're looking for:

 - 6+ years of progressive experience in Channel roles at enterprise software companies preferably security, with a focus on building and revenue

 - Proven experience in developing and executing channel strategies that have successfully driven growth and revenue in cybersecurity and SaaS, with a track record of exceeding sales targets and driving significant revenue through strategic channel partnerships.

 - Deep, established executive-level relationships with key named National and Regional Partners, with a demonstrated ability to influence partner strategy and execution, secure commitment, and expand business.

 - Advanced consultative selling approach and relationship-building skills to drive alignment and mindshare within partner organizations.

 - Proven ability to lead joint selling efforts and develop and deliver impactful partner enablement, training, and go-to-market strategies.

 - Excellent cross-functional collaboration and communication skills, with the demonstrated ability to influence outcomes and serve as an effective internal advocate for partners.

 - Advanced analytical skills with experience utilizing data-driven insights from pipeline tracking, forecasting, and industry trends to optimize partnership strategies and manage risks.

 - Highly organized, self-starter who has thrived in remote, fast-paced, and evolving environments and demonstrated the ability to adapt to rapid changes while delivering results and managing multiple priorities.

 - Demonstrates a proactive, driven, and results-oriented approach, coupled with strong accountability and a passion for cultivating world-class channel partnerships.

 - Experience mentoring junior Channel Account Managers preferred

 - Ability to travel up to 50%+ as needed.

 - Preference for candidates located in Chicago, Boston, New York.



What you can expect:

 - Own and drive revenue growth through strategic National and Regional Partners by developing joint business plans, setting sales targets, and executing go-to-market strategies.

 - Develop and maintain strong, trusted relationships with executive and senior leadership at key National and Regional Partner organizations to drive mindshare and commitment to 1Password solutions.

 - Expand and optimize the partner ecosystem by identifying, recruiting, and activating new partners that align with 1Password’s strategic growth initiatives.

 - Lead joint selling efforts with partners, including account mapping, co-selling strategies, and pipeline development to accelerate revenue.

 - Enable and empower partners by delivering effective sales training, marketing programs, and demand generation initiatives.

 - Work cross-functionally with internal sales, marketing, and product teams to drive alignment and maximize partner impact.

 - Leverage data-driven insights to measure partner performance, adjust strategies, and maximize success.

 - Serve as an advocate for partners internally, ensuring they receive the support and resources needed to drive sales and customer adoption.

 - Champion 1Password’s differentiation in the competitive landscape and position it as a leading security solution within the partner ecosystem.

 - Drive execution urgency, ensuring alignment with 1Password’s fast-paced growth and evolving partner strategy.



USA-based roles only: The annual base salary for this role is between $114,000 USD and $165,000 USD, and is commission-eligible. title: Product Manager — DeFi Products & Applications
description_text:
ABOUT THE ROLE

We're looking for a Product Manager to own and drive DeFi products spanning liquid staking, token launch infrastructure, and on-chain payment rails. You'll work at the intersection of protocol design, tokenomics, DeFi integrations, and regulatory strategy — translating complex on-chain mechanics into products that users trust and adopt.

This is a high-ownership role for someone who understands DeFi deeply and can move fluidly between smart contract mechanics, liquidity strategy, partnership development, and go-to-market execution.




CORE RESPONSIBILITIES

 - Define product strategy, roadmap, and requirements for one or more DeFi products, balancing user experience with protocol economics.

 - Design and refine tokenomics and incentive mechanisms — yield models, reward distribution, fee accrual, referral systems, and season/budget structures.

 - Drive DeFi integrations and partnerships: DEX/AMM listings, lending market collateral use cases, restaking integrations, liquidity routing, and LP incentives.

 - Own liquidity and treasury considerations — peg stability, liquidity depth across venues, mint/redeem arbitrage, and treasury operations.

 - Partner with legal & compliance on token classification, KYC/AML, sanctions screening, jurisdictional restrictions, and securities exposure.

 - Work closely with security and audit teams on smart contract risk, vault mechanics, custody, incident response, and anti-abuse safeguards.

 - Drive growth: TVL and volume expansion, user/creator/staker acquisition, CEX listings, and go-to-market with ecosystem and BD partners.

 - Support governance processes — parameter control, DAO/multisig operations, and upgrade workflows.


WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR

 - Strong understanding of DeFi primitives: staking/liquid staking, AMMs and bonding curves, lending markets, yield mechanics, and tokenomics design.

 - Experience shipping crypto/DeFi products (as PM, founder, or closely adjacent technical/strategy role).

 - Comfort reasoning about smart contract mechanics, liquidity dynamics, and on-chain incentive design — you don't need to write Solidity, but you should be able to speak fluently with those who do.

 - Awareness of the regulatory landscape around tokens, staking, and payments (securities, AML, tax treatment).

 - Ability to balance rapid iteration with the security and risk discipline that on-chain products demand.

 - Strong collaboration skills across engineering, security, legal, growth, and external partners.


NICE TO HAVE

 - Experience with restaking, LSTs, or token launch platforms.

 - Background in payments, billing/metering, or fintech infrastructure.

 - Familiarity with AI/compute infrastructure or decentralized compute economics.

 - Existing network across DeFi protocols, market makers, exchanges, or auditors.




WHAT WE OFFER

 - Purpose: The opportunity to contribute to making AI a public good

 - Growth: A self-directed environment where you can take initiative to shape your role and career

 - Compensation: Market-competitive compensation including, for most roles, exposure to pre-launch tokens

In addition, 0G Labs is committed to the health and well being of all of our team members. To that end, we provide reimbursements towards a holistic set of experiences and courses:

 - Core self: Transcendental Meditation

 - Mind: Landmark Education https://www.landmarkworldwide.com

 - Emotion: Art of Communication

 - Presence: Speech Coach

 - Body: Fitness, gym and exercise memberships/classes

title: Robot Operations Manager PM
description_text:
Shift: PM Shift




ABOUT 1X

We’re building humanoid robots that work in home - doing the chores, handling the tasks, and giving people their time back. Simple, but it’s not.



To do this right, we have to solve robotics, AI, and manufacturing at the same time, at scale, in a form factor that has to be safe enough to live with your family. If you’re inspired by this, you’ll thrive here. We’ve been at this since 2014 and we’re at the point where the hard problems are behind us and the hard work is in front of us.



NEO is our flagship - a home robot designed to move, learn, and operate in the real world alongside real people. We’re not demoing it - we’re shipping it. We’re excited to meet you if this excites you.



If you’ve spent your career working on problems that matter and want to see them actually reach the world - this is that moment. We’re scaling, we’re hiring with intention, and we need people who want to build something that will genuinely change how humans spend their time - safely creating abundance for all.




ABOUT THE TEAM

The Maintenance & Repair Operations team is responsible for keeping robotic systems operating reliably as we scale from prototype development into higher-volume deployment. The team sits at the intersection of engineering, manufacturing, quality, and field operations - closing critical feedback loops between hardware performance and product improvement.



This group plays a direct role in improving robot reliability, operational readiness, and scalability across the entire lifecycle of our systems.




YOUR CHARTER

As the PM Operations Manager, Service, you will lead the PM shift of our internal Maintenance & Repair Operations organization. You’ll own the execution and scaling of repair operations for complex electromechanical robotic systems — from intake and diagnostics through repair, validation, and return-to-service.



This role is critical to ensuring system reliability, operational throughput, and rapid feedback into engineering as 1X scales humanoid robot production and deployment. You’ll operate as both a hands-on technical leader and an operational builder, developing the processes, standards, and team needed to support a rapidly growing robotics operation.




KEY OUTCOMES

 - Build and lead a high-performing PM shift repair and maintenance operation supporting robotic system reliability at scale

 - Establish scalable workflows for diagnostics, repair, validation, failure tracking, and return-to-service processes

 - Drive measurable improvements in repair turnaround time, repeat failure reduction, and operational throughput

 - Partner cross-functionally with Engineering, Manufacturing, and Quality teams to improve product reliability and serviceability

 - Develop and mentor a growing team of repair technicians and diagnostic/service engineers across both hourly and salaried functions





KEY COMPETENCIES

 - Strong hands-on troubleshooting capability across complex electromechanical systems

 - Ability to lead technical teams in fast-paced, high-growth operational environments

 - Deep operational instincts with experience building scalable repair or maintenance workflows

 - Excellent root cause analysis and structured problem-solving skills

 - Comfortable operating both strategically and tactically — from process development to hands-on repair work on the floor




MINIMUM REQUIREMENTS

 - 4–6+ years of experience in electromechanical repair, maintenance, sustaining engineering, or related technical operations environments

 - Proven experience leading technical teams in manufacturing, robotics, automotive, aerospace, or other high-reliability industries

 - Strong experience troubleshooting and repairing complex hardware systems

 - Ability to operate effectively in ambiguous, rapidly evolving startup environments

 - Bachelor’s degree in a technical discipline preferred, but not required




PREFERRED SKILLS

 - Experience supporting robotics, autonomous systems, EV platforms, or aviation systems

 - Background in depot operations or medium-to-high volume repair environments

 - Familiarity with reliability engineering concepts, failure analysis, and structured root cause methodologies

 - Experience working within traceability-driven or safety-critical operational environments

 - Exposure to scaling repair or refurbishment operations from prototype to production volume




WHAT DOES A SUCCESSFUL 1X TEAM MEMBER LOOK LIKE

Team members at 1X who thrive here are builders. They move fast, own their work completely, and treat time like it’s the one thing you can’t get back — because it is. They say what they mean, finish what they start, and hold themselves to a standard before anyone has to ask. We push each other to be better, and we do it with honesty and respect.




COMPENSATION RANGE

$145,000 – $175,000 + equity




BENEFITS

 - Comprehensive medical, dental, and vision coverage

 - Generous paid time off, company holidays, and parental leave

 - 401(k) plan with company match (100% on the first 3% of contributions, 50% on the next 2%)

 - Flexible Spending Accounts (FSA) and Health Savings Accounts (HSA) options

 - Commuter benefits (transit and parking)

 - Short-term and long-term disability, and life insurance

 - Employee Assistance Program (EAP) for mental health, financial, and personal support

 - Onsite snacks and catered lunches




EQUAL OPPORTUNITY EMPLOYER

1X is an Equal Opportunity Employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, national origin, ancestry, citizenship, age, marital status, medical condition, genetic information, disability, military or veteran status, justice system impact, or any other characteristic protected under applicable federal, state, or local law.
